_publications._publicationTitle: Merlin deficiency predicts FAK inhibitor sensitivity: a synthetic lethal relationship.

_contextSnippet: Merlin-negative parental MDA-MB-231 cells formed stellate, poorly consolidated colonies in MoT culture...which changed into round, smooth-surfaced morphology upon forced expression of NF2
details: Formed stellate, poorly consolidated colonies in MoT culture which changed to round, smooth-surfaced morphology upon forced NF2 expression
